productDisplayName: Nike Men Dunk Low Black Sports Shoes
description: Designed for superior performance and comfort, the nike Dunk Low has a heel counter designed to provide ample structural support to the ankle, protecting it from sprains and injuries when running. Coupled with an uber cool look is its superior traction feature that makes the nike Dunk Low a huge favourite both on the track and off it. If you enjoy donning that sporty look, simply pair the Dunk High with jeans and casual tees.UpperPerforated toe uppers for added breathability and dry, fresh comfortPadded tongue and sockliner for snug Fit and added protection from shockLace-up system for snug fitMidsoleFull length EVA midsole for added cushioning and impact protectionOutsoleFlexible multi-directional rubber outsole with a full cupsole stitch for durabilitySemi-circular grooved forefoot with pivot point for easy 180° rotation of the foot without causing injuryshoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
